creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Running "make tinderbox" results in:

collect2: fatal error: ld terminated with signal 11 [Segmentation fault], core dumped
compilation terminated.
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd13.0-ld: BFD (GNU Binutils) 2.32 assertion fail elfxx-sparc.c:763
--- libc.so.7.full ---
*** [libc.so.7.full] Error code 1

make[6]: stopped in /usr/home/trasz/svn/head/lib/libc
1 error

% pkg info | grep sparc
sparc64-binutils-2.32_1,1      GNU binutils for sparc64 cross-development
sparc64-gcc-6.4.0_7            Cross GNU Compiler Collection for sparc64
sparc64-xtoolchain-gcc-0.4_1   Pre seeded toolchain to cross build FreeBSD base

% uname -a
FreeBSD tank 13.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r353732M: Sun Oct 20 00:15:22 CEST 2019     trasz@tank:/usr/obj/usr/home/trasz/svn/head/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64
